Improvements or changes are in the works for your social life, hopes, dreams, or community involvement this month, dear Aries. February is powerful for payoffs from recent career or business efforts, networking, and connecting with friends. It's a more sociable phase, and taking some educated risks can expand your world now.

People are receiving you well, and possibly speaking highly of you as well. This is a month for making some bold moves, but not for pushing an idea or project that’s not ready to launch. February is a sociable month for you – one in which being part of a team brings you the most success. Share your time, ideas, and expertise now.

This is one of the more goal-oriented times of the year for you, dear Taurus, with Mars at the top of your solar chart all month and a Solar Eclipse occurring there as well. February is about starting anew and making some waves. Your commitment is strong. You want to take charge of your future. As the month progresses, a social theme grows stronger, and your pursuit of happiness comes into greater focus.

This month, you seem to need more order and purpose in your life, and it’s an excellent time to achieve this. This theme will stick with you for some time, in fact, and it’s only just beginning to take flight, nudged along with the Solar Eclipse on the 17th. Success may be about career, reputation, or simply staying on top of things--whatever your particular definition at this point in your life, you are hungering for it!

February brings an exploratory energy and investigative spirit to your life, dear Gemini, and experiences that take you out of the usual routine can be a strong draw. The Solar Eclipse on the 17th can further stir your desire to expand your horizons. Adventures, big or small, are in order. You crave more interactivity, and your aspirations and ideals are driving forces in your life. Still, as the month progresses, a focus on your practical goals and responsibilities builds and strengthens.

The month is excellent for mind-opening experiences and seeking more meaning in your life. You’re trying new ways of approaching the world around you, exploring beyond your usual bounds, and breaking out of the regular routine. Whether it's physical or mental travel, sharing ideas, expressing yourself in new and exciting ways, or finding additional audiences, you're expanding your reach.

The Full Moon on the 1st can bring a learning or transportation matter to a head, and a turning point in your life. New avenues for communicating and commuting can lead to fabulous improvements, ultimately. For now, however, it can be chaotic as you adapt to the changes.

February positions you well for observation, strategy, investigation, and research, dear Cancer. Finances may deserve special consideration, particularly shared money and property, as well as loans and support. A passion project or special relationship can consume much of your attention. The month’s energies shift from inward to outward as it progresses, and in the second half, you’re up for new experiences and a more hands-on approach to your life. Until then, you’re in great shape for planning things out.

The first three weeks of February are more for keen observation than bold moves, but this doesn’t mean you’ll be inactive. There is likely to be an emphasis on deeper, more meaningful relationships with others or getting in deeper touch with your inner desires. Your intimate life speeds up this month, and conflicts regarding money or power dynamics can be part of the picture. Your reasoning and negotiating skills step up a notch, however, and problems are likely to be resolved fairly and relatively quickly.

There is a strong tendency to turn inward this month, and special projects or the need/desire to pour a lot of energy into something important to you can figure strongly. You’re not very interested in doing things halfway right now! Be willing to compromise and to make a fresh start with others, but if you genuinely feel short-changed, this can be a time when you’re ready to stand up for your needs and desires. Feelings are more intense than usual, although not uncomfortably so. In fact, you are more willing than usual to explore your deeper feelings. Love becomes a little more straightforward, and feelings tend to be expressed unreservedly from the 10th onward.

February is a lively month for close relationships, dear Leo. While you may not always feel you're calling the shots, you have excellent opportunities to improve your interactions and connections. It's a powerful period for attracting or enhancing a special relationship, especially a partnership.

Tremendous energy is with you in February for work, chores, or self-care pursuits, dear Virgo. It's an excellent time to scratch off most items on your to-do list and to initiate new programs and projects. But while work and mundane matters take center stage in the first few weeks of the month, you become more and more relationship-focused as February progresses.

With such a strong emphasis on your solar sixth house, organizing the little things will go a long way towards a stronger sense of accomplishment this month. You can work longer hours than usual, or push harder in health and fitness routines. While the Solar Eclipse on the 17th can bring new energy into your daily routines or work projects, it can also temporarily drain you if you are pushing yourself beyond your limits.

February is strong for injecting some inspiration into your creative or romantic life, dear Libra. Love, pleasure, joy, entertainment, and your personal life are in stronger focus. Your powers of attraction run exceptionally high, and you can pour more energy into expressing and enjoying yourself. It's natural to attract favorable attention from others, and passions run high. Hobbies are a stronger draw. As the month progresses, work matters become a stronger priority, as do self-care and health programs. It’s an excellent time not only for finding and enjoying work but also for relationships on the job.

You may frequently find yourself in the right circumstances to fully enjoy and express yourself, especially in the first weeks of the month, especially. While you should watch for impatience, this is an excellent time to have the courage to pursue your heart’s desire. It can be a spirit-feeding, pleasurable time in your life. At the very least, you’ll put plans in place for bringing more playfulness into your world. The Solar Eclipse on the 17th may usher in change and new beginnings on these fronts. You might resolve to make more time for play, and since this eclipse is part of a larger set that lasts until early 2028, this is just the beginning.

After a spell of being fairly wrapped up in your personal life, you may realize the need to reach out to others and remind them that they matter to you around the Full Moon on the 1st. It’s a time to enjoy new revelations and share your findings with people you care about. This Full Moon reminds you of your need for friends, associates, community support, or like-minded people.

You’re connecting with your needs for a solid, happy base of operations this month, dear Scorpio, with a strong focus on your solar sector of heart and home. The month also spotlights your creativity, hobbies, pleasures, and love life, especially as it progresses. Improvements in your living conditions, family relations, and leisure time can figure strongly. Home life is especially animated. It's a good time to channel excess energy into projects around the home.

With Mars in your solar fourth all month and a Solar Eclipse occurring in the same sector on the 17th, your domestic life is busy. Projects around or in the home are favored, and so are activities with family and loved ones. Because the energies centered on this sector of your solar chart are so dynamic, you’ll want to do something special, take action, and make changes. In fact, changes in your family dynamic or home life are necessary–and may be a long time coming–as the Solar Eclipse ushers in powerful energy for new beginnings in your personal life.

Balancing your personal and professional/public life can be challenging, but it’s an important goal around the Full Moon on the 1st. This lunation, happening at the top of your solar chart, can mark the culmination of a significant work project or a scurry of activity on the job or in your public life. Events occur that highlight your responsibilities. Acknowledging your need to perform, lead, and manage can be in focus, and you might recognize buried needs or bring a project to fruition.

Sagittarius datesare approximately from November 22 to December 21. However, it’s important to note that all Sun sign dates are approximate since they change from year to year. In other words, they’re dependent on your birth year, and in some cases, birth time. If your birth date is on or near either of these dates, then you may have a Sagittarius Sun sign or something else (Scorpio or Capricorn). Be certain with the following tool:What’s My Sun Sign?

February's pace is sometimes quick for you, dear Sagittarius, as your desire for variety increases and you seek mental engagement and contact. It’s a time to reach out to others and enjoy the connections you’re making. There is special emphasis on communicating, connecting, and learning this month, and your sector of home and family is building in power. You’re curious, sharing more, making contacts and connections, learning new skills, and discovering or indulging personal interests.

You can be fired up over a new or renewed personal interest, and it can be a powerful time for new beginnings with transportation and connection. There can be many errands and daily comings and goings to manage. For some, communication or transportation breakdowns prompt new beginnings. While frustrating, new worlds can open up as you approach the world differently and discover new ways to express yourself and connect with others.

February brings a strong focus on predictability, security, and money matters, dear Capricorn. It can be a time to take charge of your finances and generate new ideas, budgets, or plans to better manage your resources, money, and talents. You’ll also focus on learning new things and improving your communication skills.

Mars charges through your solar second house all month, and a Solar Eclipse happens in this same sector of your solar chart on the 17th. As such, you can be intent on bringing your recent ideas and endeavors to life and building or developing these projects. With this strong emphasis, you want tangible results, but you’re also willing to put in the time and energy to achieve your goals! While the month can be intense at times, you’re moving towards a more patient and moderate approach to life that truly works for you.

February is very much about attending to your personal needs, dear Aquarius. Generally speaking, things are playing in your favor. With Mars in your sign all month, your independence and freedom are especially important to you. Your desire nature is very powerful, and while you may need to tone it down a little at times, if you use this period well, you’ll have all the courage necessary to make your dreams happen. The ball is very often in your court this month.

This can be a time of moving ahead with personal plans, becoming more active and involved, communicating, learning, and competitive undertakings. Mind you, you could feel that you’re often left to your own resources or especially independent, and this may or may not be welcome at this time in your life! However, certain people in your life seem to have your interests, agenda, and happiness in mind.

February brings a diverse mix of introspective and sociable energy to your world, dear Pisces. Huge stirrings are happening inside of you, but you’re also managing to get out and about and divide your time well. While you are in social demand this month, a part of you is likely to remain reserved or withdrawn, and this is healthy and necessary!

Much of February feels like you’re doing preparation work or laying down foundations. Make it your goal to be patient and enjoy the process. Moments of reflection and rest for yourself are important, especially in the first half of the month. It’s not the best time for highly demanding or competitive activities. There is an unusual number of influences highlighting your privacy sector, and soul-searching is necessary. You need a break from a hectic pace and the critical eyes of others.

While it's the end of the solar year for you (until February 18th), and this generally signals a period in which you are in the relative backwoods and possibly dealing with endings in your life, there is, nevertheless, much to be excited about. You are building and strengthening your courage.
